target_audience: A framework operator deciding whether upstream allocation and policy diagnosis can produce a concrete next task instead of stopping at narrative recommendations.
expected_runtime_effect: The diagnosis should name allocation, policy, and resource evidence as the upstream cause surface.
The resulting organization recommendation should become a concrete follow-up task rather than remaining only prose.
The follow-up task should preserve orchestrator and decision provenance from the runtime proof loop.
remaining_gap: The task is opened through the existing task-open surface rather than being auto-emitted by runtime-loop-proof.
Additional runtime-generated diagnosis families still need the same follow-up task proof.
